data.name: JJKanban_Desc
data.value: Configurable drag & drop Kanban board for any Dataverse table.

data.name: SwimlaneColumn_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the column that determines the swimlane (e.g. statuscode, _pp_stage_value, statecode).

data.name: SwimlaneSourceType_Desc
data.value: Choose how the swimlane values are resolved.

data.name: ConfigRecord_Desc
data.value: Optional name of a jj_kanbanconfig record. When set, swimlane order/labels/colors and card layout come from that record.

data.name: TitleColumn_Desc
data.value: Defaults to the primary name column when blank.

data.name: AccentColorColumn_Desc
data.value: Optional. Column with a hex color used as the card accent stripe.

data.name: TooltipColumn_Desc
data.value: Optional. Column whose value is shown when hovering a card. Leave empty to keep the default "Double-click to open" hint. Use a text column (e.g. pp_name) or a lookup (e.g. pp_contact) to show the related record's name. The column must be in the bound view.

data.name: SortColumn_Desc
data.value: Optional. Decimal/float column on the table that stores manual card order. When set, drag & drop also reorders cards within a lane and the new position is persisted to this column.

data.name: PageSize_Desc
data.value: How many records the board loads at once. Overrides the subgrid's "Rows" setting. Default 100. A "Load more" button appears if the total exceeds this.

data.name: LaneColors_Desc
data.value: Auto uses the Choice/Status colors from metadata (neutral grey when none is set). Neutral forces every lane to a calm grey regardless of metadata.

data.name: ThemeMode_Desc
data.value: auto follows the host app's theme.
